title: lathyrus vernus f. gracilis
intro: Lathyrus vernus f. gracilis, also known as the spring pea or vernal pea, is a flowering plant that belongs to the legume family and is native to Europe and Asia. The plant contains a toxin called ODAP, which can be toxic in large quantities, but it also has medicinal properties that can be utilized when prepared properly. The medicinal properties of Lathyrus vernus f. gracilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and act as a natural diuretic. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, have been used to treat various health issues, including arthritis, gout, and urinary tract problems.
